foods.name: Classic McCAT Burger
foods.description: Two all-beef patties with special sauce, lettuce, cheese, pickles, and onions on a sesame seed bun.

foods.name: Spicy Fiesta Burger
foods.description: Crispy beef patty loaded with jalapeños, fiery sauce, cheddar cheese, and fresh tomatoes.

foods.name: Double Stack Deluxe
foods.description: Double stacked beef patties with bacon, mushroom, Swiss cheese and garlic aioli.

foods.name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
foods.description: Juicy beef patty topped with sautéed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, and creamy garlic sauce.

foods.name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
foods.description: Golden crispy chicken fillet with lettuce, tomato, and our signature mayo on a toasted bun.

foods.name: Spicy Chicken Wings (6pcs)
foods.description: Six pieces of crispy wings tossed in our signature spicy buffalo sauce. Served with dip.

foods.name: Grilled Chicken Platter
foods.description: Tender grilled chicken breast with herbs and spices. Served with rice and salad.

foods.name: Large Fries
foods.description: Golden crispy fries seasoned with sea salt. Large serving for big appetites.

foods.name: Onion Rings (8pcs)
foods.description: Crunchy beer-battered onion rings served with smoky BBQ dipping sauce.

foods.name: Coleslaw
foods.description: Creamy homestyle coleslaw made fresh daily with crisp cabbage and carrots.

foods.name: Classic Cola
foods.description: Ice-cold refreshing cola served with crushed ice. Available in regular and zero sugar.

foods.name: Fresh Lemonade
foods.description: Freshly squeezed lemonade with a hint of mint. Perfectly sweet and tangy.

foods.name: Chocolate Milkshake
foods.description: Thick and creamy chocolate milkshake topped with whipped cream and chocolate drizzle.

foods.name: McCAT Sundae
foods.description: Classic vanilla soft serve topped with hot fudge sauce and rainbow sprinkles.

foods.name: Apple Pie
foods.description: Warm flaky pastry filled with cinnamon-spiced apple filling. Baked fresh every hour.
